channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Global oil demand to plunge amid disruptions caused by war on Iran: IEA
item.description: The IEA's oil 'demand destruction' report comes after its chief said unnamed countries are hoarding stocks.

item.title: Israel-Lebanon direct talks in the US: All to know
item.description: Israel and Lebanon hold first direct talks since 1993, but Hezbollah's rejection threatens the US-brokered effort.

item.title: Iran slams YouTube ban on pro-Iranian group’s Lego-style AI videos
item.description: Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman says the move aims to 'suppress the truth about their illegal war on Iran'.

item.title: Sanctioned tankers transit Strait of Hormuz amid US blockade
item.description: Chinese-owned tanker Rich Starry becomes the first sanctioned vessel to exit the Gulf after the US blockade.

item.title: Russia’s Lavrov visits China as US pressures Iran with Hormuz blockade
item.description: China and Russia have been vocal critics of the US-Israel war on Iran, an ally of both world powers.

item.title: World faces food ‘catastrophe’ if Strait of Hormuz disruption persists: FAO
item.description: Global agriculture is highly exposed to the blockage of waterways, risking higher commodity prices and food inflation.

item.title: Palestine weekly wrap: ‘Master of the house’ says Ben-Gvir as Al-Aqsa opens
item.description: Nine-year-old Ritaj Rihan among multiple Palestinians killed in ongoing Gaza attacks amid fears of escalating violence.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 46 of the US-Iran conflict?
item.description: The US started a blockade on Iranian ports, but Trump said there is still a chance for Tehran to reach a deal.

item.title: Asia’s stock markets surge, oil falls on hopes for US-Iran talks
item.description: Relief for global markets comes after Trump says Iranian officials are keen on a deal.

item.title: US military kills two men in new strike on vessel in eastern Pacific
item.description: Latest attack brings death toll from US strikes on vessels in the Pacific and Caribbean to at least 170 since September.
